Class AudioEndpointReference

Namespace
WindowsAudioWrapper.Models
Assembly
WindowsAudioWrapper.dll

Acts as a data-contract wrapper tracking hardware location properties used to resolve targets.

Properties

ApoFxProperties

Gets or sets opaque APO/driver effect properties captured for this endpoint.

public Dictionary<string, string> ApoFxProperties { get; set; }

Property Value

Dictionary<string, string>

ContainerId

Gets or sets the Plug-and-Play physical container association identifier.

public string ContainerId { get; set; }

Property Value

string

DeviceId

Gets or sets the absolute internal IMMDevice endpoint identifier token.

public string DeviceId { get; set; }

Property Value

string

Flow

Gets or sets the underlying system audio flow context mapping. Safely ignored in JSON layout.

[JsonIgnore]
public AudioFlow Flow { get; set; }

Property Value

AudioFlow

FriendlyName

Gets or sets the localized friendly presentation display name of the hardware endpoint.

public string FriendlyName { get; set; }

Property Value

string

FullName

Gets or sets the native infrastructure data logs. Safely ignored in JSON layout.

[JsonIgnore]
public string FullName { get; set; }

Property Value

string

HardwareDetails

Gets or sets the multi-tier driver descriptor block entries.

public HardwareDetails HardwareDetails { get; set; }

Property Value

HardwareDetails

IsEndpointEnabled

Gets or sets a tracking flag stating if the endpoint reference is active. Safely ignored in JSON layout.

[JsonIgnore]
public bool IsEndpointEnabled { get; set; }

Property Value

bool

Translates unmanaged live endpoint structures cleanly down to serializable contract configurations.
